author: THSV StreamBridge Project
description: A harmless reference package that demonstrates wizard-rendered settings without executing add-on code.
changelog: Initial reference package for the public add-on contract.

manifest.name: Declarative Settings Example
installationSteps: Open Add-ons in the local wizard, choose this .thsv-addon file, review the metadata, and approve installation.
uninstallationSteps: Uninstall it from Add-ons. Creator settings remain preserved until deliberately deleted.
